nasb.text: “Speak now to Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua the son of Jehozadak, the high priest, and to the remnant of the people saying,

esv.text: “Speak now to Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua the son of Jehozadak, the high priest, and to all the remnant of the people, and say,

cnv.text: “你要對撒拉鐵的兒子猶大省長所羅巴伯，和約撒答的兒子大祭司約書亞，以及所有餘剩的子民，說：

ccb.text: “你去告诉撒拉铁的儿子犹大省长所罗巴伯、约撒答的儿子大祭司约书亚和所有的余民，
